name: Yuru Danno
description: Yuru (ユル, Yuru?) is Asa's older twin. He's a boy who was raised in a village deep in the mountains. Of the twins separated by day and night, he is the "night" twin so he is destined to have the power of Fuu. He is the master of Sayuu-sama: Left and Right. From the anime and manga daemons of the shadow realm.
creator: StarKonata
